textByHash.a2a17c8c731b0a6f1b8def88d63b1886dc1ed153: Fool, warriors blessed by Khazard don't die. You can't kill that which is already dead. However I can kill you!
textByHash.aeb6f8a6280ef06cf2b1bd65f4816b06317a7f36: Ha, you really think you stand a chance? I'll crush you.
textByHash.b2fdb737914844e68a9e5e228ee256f119bbf97c: Go back to your pesky little green friends.
textByHash.c670207ed142e91c6bcf381f1cb4b3e17ed8ff57: I'll crush you and those pesky little green men!
textByHash.c9071bd706a3134696cb630df5316e13639c7983: Don't speak to me you insignificant wretch! Die in the name of Khazard!
textByHash.ec7999ab6b80d9335e3148276d52a2c76d9c2c50: You're out of your depth traveller. These orbs are part of a much larger picture.
textByHash.ef970bcd67e742bbef30c0ba6f64fddf621c52fe: You think you're so clever. You know nothing!
